revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-385

A structural board manufactured from large thin flakes of waste wood bonded together with synthetic resin under pressure to give a strong board of good dimensional stability, comparable to, but more economic than, plywood.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Sterling board}}
